apc.aiNote: Ensure to actually produce Levantine Arabic as spoken in Syria, Lebanon or Palestine, not textbook MSA. Return Arabic script. If you want to include a gap in the text, use the (U+0640 TATWEEL) character

arz.aiNote: Ensure to actually produce spoken Egyptian Arabic, not textbook MSA. Return Arabic script. If you want to include a gap in the text, use the (U+0640 TATWEEL) character

por.aiNote: Focus on spoken, conventional Portugese. Give African and Brazilian the same weight as European Spanish.

spa.aiNote: Focus on spoken, conventional Spanish. Give South American Spanish the same weight as European Spanish.
